evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; r.cards=document.querySelectorAll('.cat-card').length; MOS.abrirModalProducto('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,900)); r.modalProductoOK=!document.getElementById('modalProducto')?.classList.contains('hidden'); r.errorConsola=false; MOS.closeModal('modalProducto'); MOS.abrirAnalitica('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,5000)); r.contentFueraDeLoading=!document.getElementById('anLoading')?.contains(document.getElementById('anContent')); r.grupoVisible=!document.getElementById('anGrupoSec')?.classList.contains('hidden'); r.chipsAlcance=[...document.querySelectorAll('#anGrupoSec button')].filter(b=>/Grupo completo|Solo canónico|Packs/.test(b.textContent)).length; r.statValor=((document.getElementById('anGrupoSec')||{}).textContent||'').indexOf('valor despachado')>=0; MOS.abrirModalSatelite('equivalente','IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1500)); r.satEquivOK=!document.getElementById('modalSatelite')?.classList.contains('hidden'); MOS.cerrarModalSatelite(); MOS.abrirMembreteCard('IDPRO0000059'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1800)); const q=document.getElementById('msAdhQty'); r.stepperValor=q&&q.value; r.stepperSano=q&&q.outerHTML.indexOf('function')<0; return r; })()
